items.title: GBP completeness grader and live-profile adapter preserve source truth
items.precondition: Synthetic condensed GBP and getGBPAIReadyData profile fixtures
steps: Run src/__tests__/gbp-completeness.test.ts
Verify condensed records grade all six supported fields
Verify the AI-ready adapter grades only fields its provider response contains
items.expected: Known missing fields are exact; no-listing records skip; provider-unobserved photo data is not reported as owner-missing; a real numeric photo count restores photo grading
items.evidence: Final focused composed receipt: 7 files / 778 tests, exit 0. The GBP completeness suite includes the production-profile adapter and unknown-photo regressions.
items.notes: Fixtures are synthetic. No Google API or database write occurred.

items.title: Production organization-audit wiring uses the correctly scoped location profile
items.precondition: executeTargets with mocked existing collaborators and two distinct synthetic location GBP profiles
steps: Execute a target mapped to location 22
Assert runGetFoundChecker receives location 22 profile data and not location 11 data
Execute an unmapped multi-location page and assert GBP completeness is omitted
Execute an unmapped single-location page and assert its only profile is used
items.expected: The production call passes real already-fetched GBP completeness data without a second request or any cross-location fallback
items.evidence: src/__tests__/get-found-production-wiring.test.ts passed inside the final 778-test focused receipt and the 1,234-test full receipt.
items.notes: This proves the real executeTargets call path at the collaborator seam; it is not a claim that a deployed worker was exercised.

items.title: The corrected PR 158 safety stack remains intact after composition
steps: Run the answer-first, generated-copy safety, copy-normalization, and GBP content-safety suites
Run the get-found checker and GBP completeness suites on the merged tree
items.expected: GeneratedCopySafetyService remains the neutral dependency; Unicode/HTML, bidi, direct and modifier-bearing unrelated-negator, answer-first, and GBP completeness regressions all pass
items.evidence: Final focused composed receipt: 7 files / 778 tests, exit 0. Merge commit 50c44781b has parents 462a204fa and 9ab895c92. Follow-up merge 239e78e4 has parents 9e674c440 and 74c1f4eda.
items.notes: The latest plans/07142026-alloro-funnel-engine Rev 9 spec and acceptance history were preserved by the follow-up merge.

items.title: Repository verification gates pass
items.precondition: Node workspace dependencies linked from the primary checkout
steps: Run npx tsc --noEmit
Run npm run check:conventions -- --strict
Run npx vitest run
Run npm run lint
Run npm run depcruise
Run git diff --check
items.expected: Every command exits 0; no new structural violation or test regression is introduced
items.evidence: TypeScript exit 0; strict conventions exit 0 with 0 structural violations; full Vitest 67 files / 1,234 tests, exit 0; ESLint exit 0 with 0 errors / 2,384 repository warnings; dependency-cruiser exit 0 with 0 errors / 38 repository warnings; git diff --check exit 0.
items.notes: Each exit was read directly. check:all was not used as evidence because its shell chain does not preserve every intermediate exit.

items.title: Observe GBP completeness on a deployed organization audit
items.precondition: A deployed dev build with Postgres, Redis/BullMQ, a connected organization, and a location-scoped GBP profile
steps: Run one organization AI SEO audit on dev
Confirm the get-found log includes gbpHasData and the expected missing-field set for the mapped location
Confirm the advisory checker changes no score or persisted result
items.expected: The deployed worker emits one scoped GBP completeness observation per mapped page and remains read-only
items.evidence: Not run. This local review branch was not deployed, and the user explicitly requested no push.
items.notes: The same production function is covered at the collaborator seam in T2, including advisory failure isolation.
items.waiver: Pre-merge deployment is unavailable for this local-only review fix. Run this smoke check on dev after merge; the remaining risk is bounded because the call is synchronous, guarded, read-only, and test-proven not to alter scoring or persistence.

items.title: Attach GitHub pull-request checks
items.precondition: A pull_request workflow configured for claude/* branches
steps: Read PR 164 check runs
Attach the current results
items.evidence: No pull_request workflow is configured for this branch pattern, so PR 164 has no check runs to attach.
items.notes: This is repository CI configuration, not a failure in PR 164. T4 records the equivalent commands run directly.
items.waiver: No GitHub PR check exists to run. Local TypeScript, strict conventions, full tests, lint, dependency-cruiser, and diff checks are recorded in T4 with direct exit codes.
